query:
SELECT j.id, j.title, j.status, j.finalVideoUrl, j.thumbnailUrl, j.aspectRatio,
       COUNT(s.id) as totalScenes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedScenes
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510100
GROUP BY j.id;
